nasb.text: And He went down with them and came to Nazareth, and He continued in subjection to them; and His mother treasured all these things in her heart.

esv.text: And he went down with them and came to Nazareth and was submissive to them. And his mother treasured up all these things in her heart.

cnv.text: 他就同他們下去，回到拿撒勒，並且順從他們。他母親把這一切事，都存在心裡。

ccb.text: 于是，耶稣随父母回到拿撒勒，并顺从他们。玛丽亚把这一切事牢记在心。

csbs.text: 于是耶稣与他们一起下去，回到拿撒勒，一直服从他们。他的母亲把这一切事都珍藏在心里。
